query:
SELECT c.status, c.classification, c.callType, COUNT(*) as cnt, tm.teamRole 
FROM calls c 
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id 
WHERE tm.teamRole = 'lead_generator' 
GROUP BY c.status, c.classification, c.callType, tm.teamRole 
ORDER BY cnt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT c.status, c.classification, c.callType, COUNT(*) as cnt, tm.teamRole 
FROM calls c 
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id 
WHERE tm.teamRole = 'lead_generator' 
GROUP BY c.status, c.classification, c.callType, tm.teamRole 
ORDER BY cnt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
